title: Spartan Protocol - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by liquidity pool manipulation to withdraw funds

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls calcLiquidityShare() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

red_flags: Inflating pool balance before burning LP tokens
Multiple swaps and transfers within the same transaction
monitoring_rules: BLOCK calcLiquidityShare() after FLASHLOAN_BORROW in the same transaction
summary: The attacker exploited a flaw in the Spartan Protocol's liquidity pool to manipulate the pool balance and withdraw funds using a flash loan. A guard could have blocked the transaction by preventing calls to calcLiquidityShare() after a flash loan.
